Fixture Requirements

Problem

Fixture requirements doc used by Phase-4 assert scripts to validate the HTML-authoring contract end-to-end.

Context

See 02_spec.html#goals for the goal set this requirements doc feeds into.

Goals

  • Cover happy-path HTML structure with section ids and heading ids.
  • Exercise cross-doc anchor resolution (FR-92).
  • Sit alongside a legacy .md sibling for mixed-state coverage.

Decisions

Authoring format

HTML-first per spec D5; legacy .md kept only for 03_legacy.md to exercise the resolver fallback.

Source: docs/pmos/features/2026-05-09_html-artifacts-fixture/01_requirements.html
